text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Tracen Academy may be big, but I'venever gotten lost.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Why would I? I already had the map<n>from the
campus pamphlets memorized<n>long before I even
started here.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And now, whenever someone asks me for<n>
directions, I can give them calmly and<n>
promptly. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Got that? If you're going to be my<n>trainer, you'd
better have this place<n>memorized as well!
